body:
## Summary
- Phase 4A ships the flock profitability report (revenue vs feed cost per flock, daily/weekly/monthly) plus the underlying egg-pricing table.
- Bundles the farm settings work that Phase 4A depended on: lat/lng, currency, owner-only update, weather endpoint wired to the farm.
- Lets farmers log multiple egg collections per day.

## What's in this PR

### Phase 4A — Profitability
- `egg_pricings` table with farm-scoped, date-ranged pricing rows and a partial unique index enforcing at most one open row per farm.
- `flock-profitability` resource computes profit/margin + industry KPIs (cost-per-dozen, FCR) per flock with daily/weekly/monthly buckets.
- Revenue uses sellable eggs (`totalEggs − brokenEggs`) priced at the active rule on each collection's date.
- Adds nullable `flock_id` to `financial_transactions` so Phase 4B can attribute non-feed expenses without another migration.

### Farm settings
- Nullable `latitude`, `longitude`, `currency` columns on `farms` with CHECK constraints.
- `GET /farms/currencies` lists 15 supported ISO codes.
- Existing update route `POST /farms/:farmId` now accepts those fields and is **owner-only**.
- Fixed `GET /farms/:farmId` and `DELETE /farms/:farmId` — both were unguarded; `GET` now requires membership, `DELETE` requires ownership.
- `POST` update schema helper corrected (response validation was silently bypassed on the 200 path).

### Weather
- Endpoint no longer takes `?latitude=&longitude=` query params. Reads from the farm. Returns 400 with a "configure latitude and longitude" message when unset.

### Egg collections
- Dropped the unique `(flock_id, date)` index. Farmers can log morning/afternoon/evening pickups separately. Aggregations already use `SUM`, so reports are unaffected.

---

## Frontend integration — endpoints and example payloads

All responses use the standard `{ status, message, data, meta }` envelope. Examples below show only the `data` portion unless the envelope matters.

### Farm — currencies

`GET /api/v1/farms/currencies`

```json
{
  "data": [
    { "code": "USD", "name": "US Dollar", "symbol": "$" },
    { "code": "EUR", "name": "Euro", "symbol": "€" },
    { "code": "ARS", "name": "Argentine Peso", "symbol": "$" }
  ]
}
```

### Farm — update (owner-only)

`POST /api/v1/farms/:farmId`

Request body (all fields optional):
```json
{
  "name": "Granja del Sur",
  "latitude": -34.6037,
  "longitude": -58.3816,
  "currency": "ARS"
}
```

Response `data`:
```json
{
  "id": "abc123",
  "name": "Granja del Sur",
  "latitude": -34.603700,
  "longitude": -58.381600,
  "currency": "ARS",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-01T12:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-18T15:30:00.000Z"
}
```

Errors:
- `400` invalid farm id or out-of-range coord or unsupported currency.
- `403` user is not the farm owner.
- `404` farm does not exist.

### Weather

`GET /api/v1/weather` (no query params)

Returns 400 if the current farm has no `latitude`/`longitude`. Frontend should prompt the user to fill those in farm settings.

Response `data` shape is unchanged.

### Egg pricing — active

`GET /api/v1/egg-pricings/active`

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "def456",
    "farmId": "abc123",
    "pricePerEgg": 0.5,
    "currency": "ARS",
    "effectiveFrom": "2026-01-01",
    "effectiveTo": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-01-01T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

Errors:
- `404` no active pricing for this farm (UI should prompt to create one).

### Egg pricing — history

`GET /api/v1/egg-pricings/history` → array of pricing rows ordered newest-first.

### Egg pricing — set

`POST /api/v1/egg-pricings`

Request body:
```json
{
  "pricePerEgg": 0.55,
  "effectiveFrom": "2026-04-01"
}
```

`effectiveFrom` is optional (defaults to today). The currently-open row is automatically closed (`effective_to = effectiveFrom − 1`) in the same transaction.

Response: 201 with the new pricing row (same shape as the active endpoint).

Errors:
- `400` validation (negative price, bad date).
- `409` `effectiveFrom` is not strictly after the current open row, or a concurrent pricing update collided on the unique index.

### Flock profitability report

`GET /api/v1/reports/flock-profitability?period=monthly&from=2026-01-01&to=2026-03-31&flockId=abc123`

Query params:
| Param | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `period` | yes | `daily` \| `weekly` \| `monthly` |
| `from` | yes | ISO date `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| `to` | yes | ISO date `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| `flockId` | no | Hashid; if omitted, report includes every flock with revenue or cost in the range |

Response `data`:
```json
{
  "farmId": "abc123",
  "currency": "ARS",
  "reportPeriod": "monthly",
  "dateRange": { "from": "2026-01-01", "to": "2026-03-31" },
  "flocks": [
    {
      "flockId": "f001",
      "flockName": "Morning Layers",
      "speciesId": "s01",
      "eggsCollected": 2700,
      "eggsSellable": 2640,
      "brokenEggs": 60,
      "eggsCollectedStacks": 90,
      "totalEggRevenue": 1452,
      "feedQuantity": 550,
      "totalFeedCost": 825,
      "totalExpenses": 825,
      "profit": 627,
      "profitMargin": 43.1818,
      "costPerDozenEggs": 3.75,
      "fcrKgPerDozen": 2.5,
      "warnings": [],
      "periodBreakdown": [
        {
          "period": "2026-01",
          "eggsCollected": 900,
          "eggsSellable": 880,
          "brokenEggs": 20,
          "eggRevenue": 440,
          "feedQuantity": 180,
          "feedCost": 270,
          "profit": 170,
          "profitMargin": 38.6364
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Period label formats:
- daily: `"2026-01-15"`
- weekly: `"2026-W03"` (ISO week, Monday-start)
- monthly: `"2026-01"`

Null-safe fields:
- `profitMargin`, `costPerDozenEggs`, `fcrKgPerDozen` are **null** when the row has no sellable eggs (division-by-zero). UI should render these as "—".
- `warnings` is always an array (possibly empty).

Errors:
- `400` invalid date range (`to < from`) or > 730 day range.
- `422` farm has no egg pricing configured at all → UI should route the user to the pricing settings.

### Egg collection — multiple per day

Same endpoints as before (`GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/flocks/:flockId/egg-collections`). The only change: `POST` no longer rejects a second (or third, etc.) entry on the same date.

---

## Test plan

Automated (256 tests, all passing):
- [x] Unit: profitability metrics — sellable eggs, null KPIs, negative profit.
- [x] Integration: egg-pricing — active/history/set, ordering conflict, farm isolation.
- [x] Integration: profitability — 422 when unconfigured, sellable revenue math, historical pricing mid-range, cost-only flocks, single-flock filter, uncovered-price warning, invalid date range.
- [x] Integration: farm update — currencies list, owner update, 403 for non-owner update + delete, 404 for non-member GET, unsupported currency, out-of-range lat.
- [x] Integration: weather — farm-based coords, 400 when unset, 502 on upstream failure.
- [x] Integration: egg-collection — two collections same day succeed.

Manual checks for reviewer:
- [ ] Create a farm, set currency + coords via `POST /farms/:farmId`.
- [ ] Set egg price via `POST /egg-pricings`, confirm `GET /egg-pricings/active` returns it.
- [ ] Log a few egg collections and feed consumptions, then call the profitability report for daily / weekly / monthly and verify totals reconcile.
- [ ] Call `GET /weather` with an unset farm → 400 with the "configure latitude and longitude" message.
- [ ] Try `DELETE /farms/:farmId` as a non-owner member → 403.

## Migrations
Four new migrations run in order:
1. `20260418120000-create-egg-pricings-table`
2. `20260418120001-add-flock-id-to-financial-transactions`
3. `20260418120002-drop-egg-collections-unique-per-day`
4. `20260418120003-add-farm-location-and-currency`

Apply with `docker compose exec app npx sequelize-cli db:migrate`.

## Design notes
Full implementation notes (decisions + extras + what was intentionally left out) are in `docs/phase-4a-implementation.md` on this branch.
title: feat(profitability): flock profitability report, egg pricing, farm settings
